slide_1.title: Welcome to YumiScan
slide_1.desc: Scan Japanese food labels and get a clear verdict based on your allergen profile.

slide_2.title: Take a photo, let AI analyze it
slide_2.desc: Frame the ingredient list, launch the scan, and let YumiScan read, translate, and classify the ingredients for you.

slide_3.title: Get a result that is easy to act on
slide_3.desc: Detected allergens, ambiguous ingredients, and safe items are grouped together so you can decide quickly and clearly.

scan_frame.title: Focus on the ingredient list first
scan_frame.desc: You do not need the full package in the photo. Move closer until the whole list is readable and the text stays sharp.
scan_frame.image_alt: Proper framing of the ingredient list on a food label
scan_frame.tip_1: Keep the entire ingredient list inside the frame.
scan_frame.tip_2: Do not cut off the beginning or end of the text.
scan_frame.tip_3: Fill the photo with useful text, not extra packaging.

scan_quality.title: Avoid glare and hold the shot steady
scan_quality.desc: Set the product down or steady your hand for a second. Clean light and a stable shot produce faster, more reliable results.
scan_quality.callout_bottom: A stable shot helps the analysis
scan_quality.tip_1: Keep fingers and shadows away from the text.
scan_quality.tip_2: Avoid shiny reflections or tilt the product slightly.
scan_quality.tip_3: Wait for a sharp image before starting the scan.

assistant.title: The AI Assistant helps you in store
assistant.desc: When an ingredient stays ambiguous, YumiScan explains the doubt and prepares ready-to-show phrases in Japanese, with romaji if you prefer pronunciation.
assistant.preview_summary: Understand the doubt and prepare a useful store question
assistant.user_text: Could you please check whether this product contains this allergen or any traces?
assistant.japanese_text: この商品にこのアレルゲン、または微量混入があるか確認していただけますか。
assistant.romaji_text: Kono shohin ni kono arerugen, matawa biryo konnyu ga aru ka kakunin shite itadakemasu ka.

slide_4.title: Add {mobile} to your home screen
slide_4.desc: Install the app like a real app so it is always one tap away while shopping or traveling.

ios_other.warning: To install the app on iPhone, first open this page in {safari}.
